title: Update local Agentic Nexus dashboard status draft from verified evidence
intent: Exercise the safe documentation/dashboard worker claim path.
friction: Workers need a controlled queue and preflight gate before accepting local tasks.
gap: No task queue claim flow exists yet.
business_value: Creates the first governed path from queued task to worker claim.
next_action: Run worker_claim_task.py and allow claim only if worker_preflight.py returns worker_can_start.

title: Complete diagnostic discovery before research worker starts
friction: Workers could otherwise start before purpose/friction/gap/value scoring is complete.
gap: Diagnostic gate is incomplete for this example session.
business_value: Proves diagnostic-first cannot be bypassed by claiming a task.
next_action: Block claim until diagnostic gate is completed.

title: Request production deployment approval after local validation
friction: Restricted production/deployment work must not be claimed without approval.
gap: Runtime approval object lookup is implemented and is being verified through normal worker preflight.
business_value: Proves restricted work pauses instead of starting automatically.
next_action: Run worker_claim_task.py and allow claim only if linked approval validation returns allowed.

title: Attempt forbidden destructive/payment-data action
friction: Unsafe workers must not claim destructive or forbidden work.
gap: Denied tasks need explicit blocked status and audit trail.
business_value: Proves forbidden work is refused and recorded.
next_action: Deny claim and rewrite as a safe diagnostic or approval-gated task.
